revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Parameter names example |name |image |image_size |image_alt |caption |alternative_name |place_of_origin |region |associated_cuisine |creator={{{creator}}} or {{{creators}}} |year |time1 |time2 |type |course |served |main_ingredient |minor_ingredient |variations |serving_size=100 g |calories |protein |fat |carbohydrate |glycemic_index |similar_dish |cookbook |commons| other }} == Usage == {{Infobox food | name = | name_lang = | name_italics = | image = | image_upright = | image_alt = | caption = | alternative_name = | type = | course = | place_of_origin = | region = | associated_cuisine = | creator = | year = | mintime = | maxtime = | served = | main_ingredient = | minor_ingredient = | variations = | serving_size = | calories = | calories_ref = | protein = | fat = | carbohydrate = | glycemic_index = | similar_dish = | cookbook = | commons = | other = | no_recipes = }} {{clear}} == Parameters == Copy and paste the infobox above into the desired article and fill in the values after the equals (=) sign. All fields are optional. For questions or examples, please see the [[{{TALKSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|discussion page]]. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- | name || This comes to the top of the box. If omitted, it will be inferred from the page title. |- | name_lang || [[ISO 639]] language code, if the ''name'' is not in English |- | name_italics || Set {{para|name_italics|true}} to italicise the name—if it is in a non-English language that uses the Roman alphabet, for example |- | image || Do not prefix with File: or Image:, or surround with square brackets [[]]. If there is no image available, leave the field empty. |- | caption || Leave empty for no image caption. |- | image_upright || Optional custom image size, as fraction of default user-specified image size. upright=yes will specify reasonable size for images with vertical aspect ratio |- | image_alt || Alt text for the image. See [[MOS:ALT]] |- | alternative_name || Alternative name for the dish. |- | place_of_origin || Place of origin of the dish. |- | region || Region or state the dish was developed. |- | associated_cuisine || Associated cuisine, preferably linking to an existing ''Fooian cuisine'' article. |- | creator ''or'' creators || Creator or creators of the dish, for dishes with a known, well documented creator(s). |- | year || Year dish was invented. |- | mintime (time1) || Minimum time required to cook the dish. |- | maxtime (time2) || Maximum time required to cook the dish. |- | type || e.g. "pie", "biscuit", etc. |- | course || Appetizer, Dessert, Drink, Main course, Salad, Side dish. |- | served || Serving temperature for the dish. |- | main_ingredient || Main ingredient/s for the dish. {{tl|Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items. |- | minor_ingredient || Ditto minor ingredient/s for the dish. |- | variations || Variations for making the dish. |- | serving_size || Default serving size ("100 g" for the standard 100 [[gram|g]] serving size). |- | calories || Calories per serving. Use a raw number for automatic conversion to kJ. |- | calories_ref || Citation for the calories per serving. |- | protein || The amount of protein in the dish per serving. |- | fat || The amount of fat in the dish per serving. |- | carbohydrate || The amount of carbohydrate in the dish per serving. |- | glycemic_index || Glycemic index (GI). Must be a simple number (e.g., without references or standard error mean.) |- | similar_dish || Any similar dish/es. |- | other || Any other information. |- | cookbook || Provides a link to the Cookbook at Wikibooks using a title other than Wikipedia's page name |- | commons || override wikidata commons link by manually specifying commons page |- | no_recipes || Set {{para|no_recipes|true}} to suppress the addition of recipe search links; omit to allow. |- | no_commons || Set {{para|no_commons|true}} to suppress the addition of Commons search links; omit to allow. |} ==Example== {{demo|reverse=1|{{Infobox food | name = Panipuri | image = Gol Guppas-Noida-UP-SP001.jpg | alternative_name = Sanskrit name - Jalapatra
''Paani patashi''/''Pani puri'' ([[Madhya Pradesh]], [[Uttar Pradesh]])
''Golgappa'', ''gol gappay'' or ''gol gappa'' ([[Haryana]], [[Delhi]], [[Punjab]], [[Karachi|Karachi or other Urdu-speaking regions of Pakistan]])
''Fuchka"/"Phuchka''/''Phuska/Puska''/''Fuska'' ([[Bengal]], [Bangladesh and West Bengal] [[Bihar]], [[Nepal]], [[Odisha|North Odisha]] and [[Assam]])
''Gupchup'' ([[Odisha]], [[Andhra Pradesh]], [[Telangana]], Southern [[Jharkhand]], [[Chhattisgarh]]) | image_upright = 1.1 | caption = Panipuri | place_of_origin = [[India]] | region = [[Indian subcontinent]] | type = [[Snack]] | main_ingredient = Flour, [[spiced seawater]], onions, potatoes, [[chickpea]]s | variations = [[Sev puri]], [[Puri (food)|Puri]] | calories = | other = | name_italics = }}}} {{clear}} == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "params": { "name": { "label": "Name of food", "description": "title on top of the infobox. If omitted, it will be default to the page title", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "name_lang": { "label": "Name language", "description": "ISO 639 language code, if the name is not in English", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "name_italics": { "label": "Italicize name", "description": "Set true to italicise the name—if it is in a non-English language that uses the Roman alphabet, for example", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "image": { "label": "Image filename", "description": "Filename for image. Do not prefix with File: or Image:, or surround with square brackets [[]]. If there is no image available, leave the field empty.", "suggested": true, "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_size": { "label": "Width of image", "description": "Optional custom image width, e.g. 240 'px' is not required.", "required": false, "type": "string", "deprecated": "Use image_upright instead per [[ MOS:IMAGESIZE]]." }, "upright": { "label": "Fraction of user-specified image width", "description": "Fractional width of image, where 1.0 is the user-specified default. 'yes' will set to 0.8", "required": false, "type": "string", "default": "1", "aliases": [ "image_upright" ] }, "alt": { "label": "Image alt string", "description": "Alt string for image", "suggested": If there is no image available, leave the field empty. |- | caption || Leave empty for no image caption. |- | image_upright || Optional custom image size, as fraction of default user-specified image size. upright=yes will specify reasonable size for images with vertical aspect ratio |- | image_alt || Alt text for the image. See [[MOS:ALT]] |- | alternative_name || Alternative name for the dish. |- | place_of_origin || Place of origin of the dish. |- | region || Region or state the dish was developed. |- | associated_cuisine || Associated cuisine, preferably linking to an existing ''Fooian cuisine'' article. |- | creator ''or'' creators || Creator or creators of the dish, for dishes with a known, well documented creator(s). |- | year || Year dish was invented. |- | mintime (time1) || Minimum time required to cook the dish. |- | maxtime (time2) || Maximum time required to cook the dish. |- | type || e.g. "pie", "biscuit", etc. |- | course || Appetizer, Dessert, Drink, Main course, Salad, Side dish. |- | served || Serving temperature for the dish. |- | main_ingredient || Main ingredient/s for the dish. {{tl|Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items. |- | minor_ingredient || Ditto minor ingredient/s for the dish. |- | variations || Variations for making the dish. |- | serving_size || Default serving size ("100 g" for the standard 100 [[gram|g]] serving size). |- | calories || Calories per serving. Use a raw number for automatic conversion to kJ. |- | calories_ref || Citation for the calories per serving. |- | protein || The amount of protein in the dish per serving. |- | fat || The amount of fat in the dish per serving. |- | carbohydrate || The amount of carbohydrate in the dish per serving. |- | glycemic_index || Glycemic index (GI). Must be a simple number (e.g., without references or standard error mean.) |- | similar_dish || Any similar dish/es. |- | other || Any other information. |- | cookbook || Provides a link to the Cookbook at Wikibooks using a title other than Wikipedia's page name |- | commons || override wikidata commons link by manually specifying commons page |- | no_recipes || Set {{para|no_recipes|true}} to suppress the addition of recipe search links; omit to allow. |- | no_commons || Set {{para|no_commons|true}} to suppress the addition of Commons search links; omit to allow. |} ==Example== {{demo|reverse=1|{{Infobox food | name = Panipuri | image = Gol Guppas-Noida-UP-SP001.jpg | alternative_name = Sanskrit name - Jalapatra
''Paani patashi''/''Pani puri'' ([[Madhya Pradesh]], [[Uttar Pradesh]])
''Golgappa'', ''gol gappay'' or ''gol gappa'' ([[Haryana]], [[Delhi]], [[Punjab]], [[Karachi|Karachi or other Urdu-speaking regions of Pakistan]])
''Fuchka"/"Phuchka''/''Phuska/Puska''/''Fuska'' ([[Bengal]], [Bangladesh and West Bengal] [[Bihar]], [[Nepal]], [[Odisha|North Odisha]] and [[Assam]])
''Gupchup'' ([[Odisha]], [[Andhra Pradesh]], [[Telangana]], Southern [[Jharkhand]], [[Chhattisgarh]]) | image_upright = 1.1 | caption = Panipuri | place_of_origin = [[India]] | region = [[Indian subcontinent]] | type = [[Snack]] | main_ingredient = Flour, [[spiced seawater]], onions, potatoes, [[chickpea]]s | variations = [[Sev puri]], [[Puri (food)|Puri]] | calories = | other = | name_italics = }}}} {{clear}} == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "params": { "name": { "label": "Name of food", "description": "title on top of the infobox. revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Parameter names example |name |image |image_size |image_alt |caption |alternative_name |place_of_origin |region |associated_cuisine |creator={{{creator}}} or {{{creators}}} |year |time1 |time2 |type |course |served |main_ingredient |minor_ingredient |variations |serving_size=100 g |calories |protein |fat |carbohydrate |glycemic_index |similar_dish |cookbook |commons| other }} == Usage == {{Infobox food | name = | name_lang = | name_italics = | image = | image_upright = | image_alt = | caption = | alternative_name = | type = | course = | place_of_origin = | region = | associated_cuisine = | creator = | year = | mintime = | maxtime = | served = | main_ingredient = | minor_ingredient = | variations = | serving_size = | calories = | calories_ref = | protein = | fat = | carbohydrate = | glycemic_index = | similar_dish = | cookbook = | commons = | other = | no_recipes = }} {{clear}} == Parameters == Copy and paste the infobox above into the desired article and fill in the values after the equals (=) sign. All fields are optional. For questions or examples, please see the [[{{TALKSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|discussion page]]. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- | name || This comes to the top of the box. If omitted, it will be inferred from the page title. |- | name_lang || [[:en:ISO 639|ISO 639]] language code, if the ''name'' is not in English |- | name_italics || Set {{para|name_italics|true}} to italicise the name—if it is in a non-English language that uses the Roman alphabet, for example |- | image || Do not prefix with File: or Image:, or surround with square brackets [[]]. If there is no image available, leave the field empty. |- | caption || Leave empty for no image caption. |- | image_upright || Optional custom image size, as fraction of default user-specified image size. upright=yes will specify reasonable size for images with vertical aspect ratio |- | image_alt || Alt text for the image. See [[MOS:ALT]] |- | alternative_name || Alternative name for the dish. |- | place_of_origin || Place of origin of the dish. |- | region || Region or state the dish was developed. |- | associated_cuisine || Associated cuisine, preferably linking to an existing ''Fooian cuisine'' article. |- | creator ''or'' creators || Creator or creators of the dish, for dishes with a known, well documented creator(s). |- | year || Year dish was invented. |- | mintime (time1) || Minimum time required to cook the dish. |- | maxtime (time2) || Maximum time required to cook the dish. |- | type || e.g. "pie", "biscuit", etc. |- | course || Appetizer, Dessert, Drink, Main course, Salad, Side dish. |- | served || Serving temperature for the dish. |- | main_ingredient || Main ingredient/s for the dish. {{tl|Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items. |- | minor_ingredient || Ditto minor ingredient/s for the dish. |- | variations || Variations for making the dish. |- | serving_size || Default serving size ("100 g" for the standard 100 [[gram|g]] serving size). |- | calories || Calories per serving. Use a raw number for automatic conversion to kJ. |- | calories_ref || Citation for the calories per serving. |- | protein || The amount of protein in the dish per serving. |- | fat || The amount of fat in the dish per serving. |- | carbohydrate || The amount of carbohydrate in the dish per serving. |- | glycemic_index || Glycemic index (GI). Must be a simple number (e.g., without references or standard error mean.) |- | similar_dish || Any similar dish/es. |- | other || Any other information. |- | cookbook || Provides a link to the Cookbook at Wikibooks using a title other than Wikipedia's page name |- | commons || override wikidata commons link by manually specifying commons page |- | no_recipes || Set {{para|no_recipes|true}} to suppress the addition of recipe search links; omit to allow. |- | no_commons || Set {{para|no_commons|true}} to suppress the addition of Commons search links; omit to allow. |} ==Example== {{demo|reverse=1|{{Infobox food | name = Panipuri | image = Gol Guppas-Noida-UP-SP001.jpg | alternative_name = Sanskrit name - Jalapatra
''Paani patashi''/''Pani puri'' ([[Madhya Pradesh]], [[Uttar Pradesh]])
''Golgappa'', ''gol gappay'' or ''gol gappa'' ([[Haryana]], [[Delhi]], [[Punjab]], [[Karachi|Karachi or other Urdu-speaking regions of Pakistan]])
''Fuchka"/"Phuchka''/''Phuska/Puska''/''Fuska'' ([[Bengal]], [Bangladesh and West Bengal] [[Bihar]], [[Nepal]], [[Odisha|North Odisha]] and [[Assam]])

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{Parameter names example |name |image |image_size |image_alt |caption |alternative_name |place_of_origin |region |associated_cuisine |creator={{{creator}}} or {{{creators}}} |year |time1 |time2 |type |course |served |main_ingredient |minor_ingredient |variations |serving_size=100 g |calories |protein |fat |carbohydrate |glycemic_index |similar_dish |cookbook |commons| other }} == Usage == {{Infobox food | name = | name_lang = | name_italics = | image = | image_upright = | image_alt = | caption = | alternative_name = | type = | course = | place_of_origin = | region = | associated_cuisine = | creator = | year = | mintime = | maxtime = | served = | main_ingredient = | minor_ingredient = | variations = | serving_size = | calories = | calories_ref = | protein = | fat = | carbohydrate = | glycemic_index = | similar_dish = | cookbook = | commons = | other = | no_recipes = }} {{clear}} == Parameters == Copy and paste the infobox above into the desired article and fill in the values after the equals (=) sign. All fields are optional. For questions or examples, please see the [[{{TALKSPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|discussion page]]. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description |- | name || This comes to the top of the box. If omitted, it will be inferred from the page title. |- | name_lang || [[:en:ISO 639|ISO 639]] language code, if the ''name'' is not in English |- | name_italics || Set {{para|name_italics|true}} to italicise the name—if it is in a non-English language that uses the Roman alphabet, for example |- | image || Do not prefix with File: or Image:, or surround with square brackets [[]]. If there is no image available, leave the field empty. |- | caption || Leave empty for no image caption. |- | image_upright || Optional custom image size, as fraction of default user-specified image size. upright=yes will specify reasonable size for images with vertical aspect ratio |- | image_alt || Alt text for the image. See [[MOS:ALT]] |- | alternative_name || Alternative name for the dish. |- | place_of_origin || Place of origin of the dish. |- | region || Region or state the dish was developed. |- | associated_cuisine || Associated cuisine, preferably linking to an existing ''Fooian cuisine'' article. |- | creator ''or'' creators || Creator or creators of the dish, for dishes with a known, well documented creator(s). |- | year || Year dish was invented. |- | mintime (time1) || Minimum time required to cook the dish. |- | maxtime (time2) || Maximum time required to cook the dish. |- | type || e.g. "pie", "biscuit", etc. |- | course || Appetizer, Dessert, Drink, Main course, Salad, Side dish. |- | served || Serving temperature for the dish. |- | main_ingredient || Main ingredient/s for the dish. {{tl|Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items. |- | minor_ingredient || Ditto minor ingredient/s for the dish. |- | variations || Variations for making the dish. |- | serving_size || Default serving size ("100 g" for the standard 100 [[gram|g]] serving size). |- | calories || Calories per serving. Use a raw number for automatic conversion to kJ. |- | calories_ref || Citation for the calories per serving. |- | protein || The amount of protein in the dish per serving. |- | fat || The amount of fat in the dish per serving. |- | carbohydrate || The amount of carbohydrate in the dish per serving. |- | glycemic_index || Glycemic index (GI). Must be a simple number (e.g., without references or standard error mean.) |- | similar_dish || Any similar dish/es. |- | other || Any other information. |- | cookbook || Provides a link to the Cookbook at Wikibooks using a title other than Wikipedia's page name |- | commons || override wikidata commons link by manually specifying commons page |- | no_recipes || Set {{para|no_recipes|true}} to suppress the addition of recipe search links; omit to allow. |- | no_commons || Set {{para|no_commons|true}} to suppress the addition of Commons search links; omit to allow. |} ==Example== {{demo|reverse=1|{{Infobox food | name = Panipuri | image = Gol Guppas-Noida-UP-SP001.jpg | alternative_name = Sanskrit name - Jalapatra
''Paani patashi''/''Pani puri'' ([[Madhya Pradesh]], [[Uttar Pradesh]])
''Golgappa'', ''gol gappay'' or ''gol gappa'' ([[Haryana]], [[Delhi]], [[Punjab]], [[Karachi|Karachi or other Urdu-speaking regions of Pakistan]])
''Fuchka"/"Phuchka''/''Phuska/Puska''/''Fuska'' ([[Bengal]], [Bangladesh and West Bengal] [[Bihar]], [[Nepal]], [[Odisha|North Odisha]] and [[Assam]])
''Gupchup'' ([[Odisha]], [[Andhra Pradesh]], [[Telangana]], Southern [[Jharkhand]], [[Chhattisgarh]]) | image_upright = 1.1 | caption = Panipuri | place_of_origin = [[India]] | region = [[Indian subcontinent]] | type = [[Snack]] | main_ingredient = Flour, [[spiced seawater]], onions, potatoes, [[chickpea]]s | variations = [[Sev puri]], [[Puri (food)|Puri]] | calories = | other = | name_italics = }}}} {{clear}} == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "params": { "name": { "label": "Name of food", "description": "title on top of the infobox. If omitted, it will be default to the page title", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "name_lang": { "label": "Name language", "description": "ISO 639 language code, if the name is not in English", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "name_italics": { "label": "Italicize name", "description": "Set true to italicise the name—if it is in a non-English language that uses the Roman alphabet, for example", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "image": { "label": "Image filename", "description": "Filename for image. Do not prefix with File: or Image:, or surround with square brackets [[]]. If there is no image available, leave the field empty.", "suggested": true, "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "image_size": { "label": "Width of image", "description": "Optional custom image width, e.g. 240 'px' is not required.", "required": false, "type": "string", "deprecated": "Use image_upright instead per [[ MOS:IMAGESIZE]]." }, "upright": { "label": "Fraction of user-specified image width", "description": "Fractional width of image, where 1.0 is the user-specified default. 'yes' will set to 0.8", "required": false, "type": "string", "default": "1", "aliases": [ "image_upright" ] }, "alt": { "label": "Image alt string", "description": "Alt string for image", "suggested": true, "type": "string", "aliases": [ "image_alt" ] }, "caption": { "label": "Image caption", "description": "Leave empty for no image caption.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "alternative_name": { "label": "Alternative name", "description": "Alternative names for the dish", "required": false, "type": "string", "aliases": [ "alternate_name" ] }, "type": { "label": "Type of dish", "description": "The dish is an instance of this kind of food", "required": false, "example": "pie", "type": "string" }, "course": { "label": "Course served", "description": "One of: Appetizer, Dessert, Drink, Main course, Salad, Side dish", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "place_of_origin": { "label": "Place of origin", "description": "Place of origin of the dish", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "region": { "label": "Region of origin", "description": "Region or state the dish was developed", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "associated_cuisine": { "label": false, "type": "number" }, "mintime": { "label": "Min cooking time", "description": "Minimum amount of time to cook the dish", "required": false, "aliases": [ "time1" ], "type": "string" }, "maxtime": "description": "Serving temperature for the dish", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "main_ingredient": { "label": "Main ingredient", "description": "Main ingredient(s) for the dish. {{Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "minor_ingredient": { "label": "Minor ingredients", "description": "Minor ingredient(s) for the dish. {{Plainlist}} may be used to separate multiple items", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "variations": { "label": "Variations", "description": "Variations in recipe to make the dish", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "serving_size": { "label": "Serving size", "description": "Default serving size ('100 g' for the standard 100 g serving size)", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "calories": { "label": "Calories per serving", "description": "Use a raw number for automatic conversion to kJ.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "calories_ref": { "label": "Calories reference", "description": "Citation for the calories per serving", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "protein": { "label": "Protein per serving", "description": "The amount of protein in the dish per serving.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "fat": { "label": "Fat per serving", "description": "The amount of fat in the dish per serving.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "carbohydrate": { "label": "Carbohydrate per serving", "description": "The amount of carbohydrate in the dish per serving.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "glycemic_index": { "label": "Glycemic Index", "description": "Glycemic index (GI). Must be a simple number (e.g., without references or standard error mean)", "required": false, "type": "number" }, "similar_dish": { "label": "Similar dishes", "description": "Any similar dish(es)", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "other": { "label": "Other information", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "belowstyle": { "label": "Link styles", "description": "CSS style for commons and cookbook links", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "no_recipes": { "label": "No recipes", "description": "If true, suppress display of cookbook link", "required": false, "default": "false", "type": "string" }, "cookbook": { "label": "Cookbook page", "description": "Provides a link to the Cookbook at Wikibooks using a title other than Wikipedia's page name. If missing, uses wikidata.", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "no_commons": { "label": "No commons", "description": "If true, suppress display of commons link", "required": false, "default": "false", "type": "string" }, "commons": { "label": "Commons page", "description": "Override wikidata commons link by manually specifying commons page", "required": false, "type": "string" }, "country": { "deprecated": "Use \"place_of_origin\" instead." }, "national_cuisine": { "deprecated": "Use \"associated_cuisine\" instead." }, "qid": { "label": "Wikidata ID", "type": "string" } }, "description": "Infobox for type of food", "format": "{{_\n| __________________ = _\n}}\n", "paramOrder": [ "name", "name_lang", "name_italics", "image", "image_size", "upright", "alt", "caption", "alternative_name", "type", "course", "place_of_origin", "country", "region", "associated_cuisine", "national_cuisine", "creator", "year", "mintime", "maxtime", "served", "main_ingredient", "minor_ingredient", "variations", "serving_size", "calories", "calories_ref", "protein", "fat", "carbohydrate", "glycemic_index", "similar_dish", "other", "belowstyle", "no_recipes", "cookbook", "no_commons", "commons", "qid" ] } {{collapse bottom}} == Microformats == ===Adr=== {{UF-adr}} ===Recipe=== {{UF-hrecipe}} == See also == * {{clc|Pages using infobox food with unknown parameters}} * [[Template:Infobox nutritional value]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox brand|Template:Infobox brand]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Food infobox templates|Food]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
